title: Start the Year With Purpose: Support Children of Fallen Patriots
description: While many resolutions fade by February, some choices have the power to change lives for years to come.
text:
Every new year invites reflection. We set resolutions to be better—to live with more purpose, generosity, and impact. While many resolutions fade by February, some choices have the power to change lives for years to come. Supporting the children of America’s fallen service members is one of those choices.
When a member of the U.S. military dies in the line of duty, their sacrifice leaves behind more than a legacy of service—it leaves behind children whose futures are forever altered. Beyond the profound emotional loss, these families often face financial uncertainty, especially when it comes to higher education. That is where Children of Fallen Patriots Foundation steps in.
Children of Fallen Patriots Foundation is dedicated to ensuring that every child who has lost a parent in military service has the opportunity to pursue higher education—whether through college or trade school—without being limited by financial barriers. The mission is simple but powerful: honor the sacrifice of fallen heroes by investing in their children’s futures.
For more than two decades, the CFP has worked alongside Gold Star families to provide college and trade school scholarships, educational counseling, and long-term career support. These resources don’t just help students enroll—they help them succeed. From navigating the college application process to staying on track through graduation, Fallen Patriots walks with students every step of the way.
Education is more than a degree. It is stability, confidence, and opportunity. For children of fallen service members, it can also be a pathway to healing and hope and a reminder that their parent’s sacrifice is remembered and honored not just in words, but through action.
As the new year begins, many people look for meaningful ways to give back. A contribution to Children of Fallen Patriots Foundation is a resolution that creates lasting impact. It transforms generosity into tangible outcomes: a tuition bill paid, a student mentored, a dream kept alive. It sends a clear message to military families that they are not alone, and that their children’s aspirations matter.
Getting involved goes beyond donating. Supporters can help spread awareness, advocate for military families, attend fundraising events, or encourage others to make giving part of their own resolutions. Every action—large or small—helps strengthen a community committed to honoring sacrifice through opportunity.
The need is urgent. Each year, more children join the ranks of those who have lost a parent in service to our country. While government benefits provide some assistance, they often fall short of covering the true cost of higher education. Without additional support, many of these students are forced to delay, downsize, or abandon their educational goals. Together, we can ensure that doesn’t happen.
This year, consider choosing a resolution with lasting meaning. Choose to stand with the families who have given so much. Choose to invest in resilience, education, and possibility. When you support Children of Fallen Patriots Foundation, you help turn sacrifice into opportunity—and make a promise that the children of our fallen heroes will never be forgotten.
Learn more at https://fallenpatriots.org/ways-to-give/
